{% extends "layouts/main-external.html" %} {% set activeNavigation = "View licences" %} {% set licence = data['licences'][data.ID] %} {% set pageName = "Change this licence name" if licence.name else "Name this licence" %} {% block containerStart %} {{ govukBackLink({ text: "Back to licence", href: "/external/licence" }) }} {% endblock %} {% block content %}
{{ licence.number }}

{{ pageName }}

{{ govukInput({ id: "licenceName", name: "licenceName", classes: "govuk-input--width-20", value: licence.name if licence.name else "" }) }} {{ govukButton({ text: "Continue", classes: "govuk-!-margin-right-3", type: "submit" }) }}
{% endblock %}
